name: electromorphosis
short_effect: When hit by an attack, the power of the next Electric-type move it uses is doubled.
effect_text: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.
flavor_text: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.
